description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features two high vertical ends with a smooth, continuous curved surface connecting them, designed for skateboarding, BMX, or inline skating. Metal guardrails run along the top edges for safety, and there are stairs on one side for easy access to the platform. The front face is decorated with graffiti-style artwork, including the word 'REVOLUTION' in bold letters and various colorful graphics. The ramp has an open central section beneath the platform, allowing for passage or storage. The overall design is robust and functional, with a focus on durability and user safety.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails, graffiti art, and side stairs for access. Designed for skateboarding and similar activities in urban parks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graffiti 'REVOLUTION', central open section, and metal guardrails along the top.
description_view_1: Interior view of the half-pipe, highlighting the smooth curved skating surface and the stairs on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional graffiti art, the open section beneath the platform, and the full height of the side stairs.
description_view_3: Opposite interior view of the half-pipe, focusing on the continuous curved surface and the guardrails.
